Why Khushi?

Why Choose Us

We are committed to providing the best travel experience with safety, comfort, and affordability.

Safe & Secure

All our drivers are verified, licensed and experienced. Your safety is our top priority on every journey.

Affordable Rates

Transparent pricing with no hidden charges. We offer the best rates for local and outstation trips.

Always On Time

We value your time. Our drivers arrive 10 minutes early so you never miss a flight or appointment.

24/7 Support

Our customer support team is available round the clock. Call or WhatsApp us anytime you need help.

Well-Maintained Fleet

Our vehicles are regularly serviced, cleaned and inspected to ensure maximum comfort and reliability.

Local Expertise

Over 10 years of serving Rajasthan. Our drivers know every road, route, and local hidden gem.

Tourist Destinations

Explore the most beautiful places across Rajasthan and North India

Rajasthan

Royal Rajasthan

Discover the land of kings, deserts, forts and palaces.

Jaipur
The Pink City

Explore Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar, and vibrant bazaars. The royal capital of Rajasthan.

Udaipur
City of Lakes

Lake Pichola, City Palace, Jagdish Temple, and romantic shikara rides. The most romantic city in India.

Jaisalmer
Golden City

The golden fort, sand dunes of Thar Desert, camel safaris, and magical desert sunsets await.

Jodhpur
Blue City

Mehrangarh Fort, Umaid Bhawan Palace, blue-painted old city lanes, and authentic Rajasthani cuisine.

Pushkar
Holy City

Sacred Pushkar Lake, the only Brahma Temple in the world, and the famous Pushkar Camel Fair.

Mount Abu
Hill Station

Rajasthan's only hill station — Dilwara Temples, Nakki Lake, lush greenery, and cool mountain air.

Bikaner
Camel Country

Junagarh Fort, Karni Mata Temple (Rat Temple), famous Bikaner bhujia, and desert safari adventures.

Ajmer
Spiritual Gateway

The sacred Dargah of Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti, Ana Sagar Lake, and gateway to Pushkar.

North India

North India Tours

From the Himalayas to the plains — explore the best of North India with us.

Delhi
National Capital

India Gate, Red Fort, Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb and the vibrant streets of Old Delhi.

Agra
Taj Mahal City

Home of the Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri — monuments of undying Mughal legacy.

Haridwar
Gateway to Gods

Sacred Ganga ghats, Har Ki Pauri, mesmerizing Ganga Aarti, and start of the Char Dham Yatra.

Shimla
Queen of Hills

Colonial charm, Mall Road, Jakhu Temple, and breathtaking Himalayan views in every direction.

Manali
Adventure Capital

Rohtang Pass, Solang Valley, river rafting, skiing, and stunning Himalayan landscapes.

Vrindavan
Land of Krishna

Banke Bihari Temple, ISKCON Vrindavan, Prem Mandir — a deeply spiritual and beautiful pilgrimage.

Rishikesh
Yoga Capital

Laxman Jhula, yoga ashrams, white-water rafting, and spiritual retreats on the Ganga banks.

Mathura
Birthplace of Krishna

Krishna Janmabhoomi, Dwarkadhish Temple, vibrant Holi celebrations and sacred ghats.

Our Services

Comprehensive taxi and travel services across India

Local Taxi Service

Hourly and daily local taxi hire in Jaipur and other Rajasthan cities for shopping, meetings, and sightseeing.

Outstation Taxi

Comfortable one-way and round-trip taxi service between any two cities across India at affordable rates.

Airport Pickup & Drop

Reliable airport transfer service for Jaipur International Airport. Flight tracking and timely pickup guaranteed.

Railway Station Pickup

Hassle-free pickup and drop service for all major railway stations in Rajasthan. Available 24/7.

One Way Taxi

Budget-friendly one-way taxi service. Pay only for the distance you travel with no return charges.

Round Trip Taxi

Convenient round-trip bookings with the same driver — ideal for day trips and return journeys.

Corporate Travel

Professional corporate travel solutions with monthly billing, dedicated fleet, and priority service.

All India Tour Packages

Customized tour packages covering Rajasthan, Golden Triangle, Char Dham Yatra, and more destinations.

Wedding Car Rental

Elegant decorated cars for weddings, baraat processions, and special occasions. Luxury fleet available.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Got questions? We have answers.

How do I book a taxi?
You can book online using our booking form, call us at 9785125935, or send a WhatsApp message. We'll confirm your booking within 15 minutes.
Do you provide 24/7 service?
Yes! We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, including holidays. Whether you need a midnight airport transfer or an early morning pickup, we're here for you.
Are your drivers verified?
Absolutely. All our drivers are licensed, background-checked, and experienced. They know the routes well and are trained in customer service and safety.
What is your pricing structure?
Our pricing is per kilometer starting from ₹12/km for sedans. For outstation trips, there may be toll, parking, and driver allowance charges. All rates are transparent and discussed before booking.
Can I book for multiple days or a full tour?
Yes! We offer multi-day tour packages, full Rajasthan circuits, Golden Triangle tours, and custom pan-India itineraries. Contact us for customized tour quotations.
Do you serve destinations outside Rajasthan?
Yes, we provide all-India taxi service. From Rajasthan to Delhi, Agra, Shimla, Manali, Haridwar, Rishikesh, and all major destinations across India.

About Us

10+ years of trusted travel service across Rajasthan and India

10+
Years of Service
Our Story

Khushi Tour and Travel

Khushi Tour and Travel is a trusted and well-established taxi service based in Rajasthan, India. Founded with a simple vision — to make travel safe, comfortable, and affordable for everyone — we have been serving thousands of happy customers across India for over a decade.

We specialize in local taxi services, outstation trips, airport and railway transfers, corporate travel, and customized tour packages across Rajasthan and all major destinations in India. Our fleet includes a wide range of well-maintained vehicles from economy sedans to premium luxury cars and spacious Tempo Travellers.

Our mission is simple: every passenger who travels with us should feel safe, comfortable, and valued. We achieve this with experienced and courteous drivers, clean and well-maintained vehicles, and transparent pricing with no surprises.

Whether you're planning a royal Rajasthan tour, a quick airport transfer, a corporate event, or a family pilgrimage — Khushi Tour and Travel is your trusted travel partner.

S
Shankar Lal Saini
Founder & Owner, Khushi Tour and Travel
